title: 10 best herbal teas for loss of appetite
description: Fennel teas helps with loss of appetite because its unique blend of phytochemicals and volatile oils stimulates digestion and alleviates digestive discomfort. The tea's anise-like flavor and aroma can also help to increase saliva production, which can improve the breakdown of food in the mouth and reduce feelings of bloating and indigestion.
